overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the bustling streets of Night City. The clip features futuristic architecture, dense commercial advertising, diverse pedestrians in cyberpunk attire, and varying traffic density as the character navigates sidewalks, plazas, and a major intersection on a sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown sidewalk with commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk following a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in green shorts walking ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall futuristic glass and steel buildings with digital signage
tropical palm trees lining the sidewalk
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades
red painted sections of the concrete sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny downtown sidewalk in Night City, with the camera following pedestrians past parked futuristic vehicles and palm trees. Glass skyscrapers tower overhead covered in digital billboards, while the character walks steadily forward through moderate crowds.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with food vendors and outdoor seating

events.description: turns right from main sidewalk into open plaza area with food stalls

agents.ego_description: turns right into a plaza area and continues walking past food vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near the Cirkus food stand

entered.detail: blue and red food stall with Cirkus branding
concrete planters and seating areas in the plaza
red shade umbrellas near seating areas

segments.scene_description: The character turns right into a semi-open plaza featuring the Cirkus food stand with its distinctive blue signage. The area has outdoor seating with red umbrellas and concrete planters, while the main street and parked cars fall out of view behind.

events.description: crosses the street at a crosswalk while futuristic vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: crosses the street at a crosswalk, navigating between passing cars

notable_agents.action: large man in a shiny yellow jacket leading the way across the street

entered.detail: white and red striped pedestrian crossing markings
futuristic cars driving along the roadway

segments.scene_description: Exiting the plaza, the character crosses a busy street at a marked crosswalk, sharing the space with a man in a distinctive yellow jacket. Vehicles pass by on the left as the character navigates the crossing and reaches the opposite sidewalk.

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various storefronts and digital displays

entered.detail: ground level shops with glass windows and signage
short metal posts separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts and traffic bollards. The street features moderate traffic with futuristic vehicles passing by on the left, while large digital billboards remain visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with grid markings

events.description: waits at the intersection corner for traffic to clear
begins crossing the wide intersection with other pedestrians

agents.ego_description: pauses at the intersection corner waiting for vehicles to pass, then crosses the wide street with a group of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving through the intersection
group of pedestrians waiting to cross the street

entered.detail: large open intersection with yellow grid markings on asphalt
massive curved billboard displaying Allsight advertisement
futuristic traffic lights and street signs

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a major intersection and waits for dense traffic to pass, including various futuristic vehicles. After pausing, the character crosses the wide intersection marked with yellow grid lines, passing beneath massive digital billboards including one for Allsight.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with commercial buildings and steam vents

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues past new storefronts

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the new sidewalk, passing pedestrians and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in camouflage jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: modern building with large windows and architectural details
vent releasing steam from the building
ground level shop signs and entrances

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk featuring new commercial buildings with ground-level storefronts. Steam vents are visible in the distance as the character passes pedestrians walking in the opposite direction and moves away from the busy intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunny downtown district of Night City, transitioning from a crowded sidewalk into a commercial plaza and finally across a massive urban intersection. It begins by following pedestrians past futuristic vehicles and palm trees beneath towering digital billboards, before turning right into a semi-open plaza characterized by the blue signage of a Cirkus food stand and red umbrellas. As the character exits the plaza, the scene shifts to a busy street crossing shared with a man in a yellow jacket, leading onto a commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts and traffic bollards. The camera then proceeds toward a major intersection, pausing for dense traffic before crossing wide yellow grid lines beneath a massive Allsight billboard. Finally, the movement continues along a new stretch of commercial buildings and ground-level storefronts, passing pedestrians and distant steam vents as the character moves away from the bustle of the intersection.
